title: Buttery Buttery Croatian Mushroom Stir-fry
description: This festive plant-based dish features tender mushrooms and smoky paprika in a buttery sauce that's perfect for a quick lunch or dinner.

ingredients.name: Portobello Mushrooms
ingredients.notes: Use more if you prefer a thicker sauce

ingredients.name: Avocado Oil
ingredients.notes: Can be replaced with other plant-based oils like olive or coconut oil

ingredients.name: Paprika Powder
ingredients.notes: Or regular paprika if you prefer non-smoked

ingredients.name: Avocado Oil
ingredients.notes: To coat the air fry basket for a buttery finish

instructions: In a large bowl, combine the sliced mushrooms, white mushrooms, onion, red bell pepper, paprika powder, and minced garlic. Season with salt and black pepper.
Drizzle with avocado oil until evenly coated. Toss to coat thoroughly.
Place the mixture in the air fryer basket, ensuring that there's enough space for even cooking. Spray the inside of the basket lightly with water or a bit more avocado oil to prevent sticking.
Air fry at 350°F (175°C) for about 20-25 minutes, shaking occasionally until the mushrooms are tender and slightly browned on top.
Serve hot with additional paprika powder if desired. Enjoy your festive Croatian mushroom stir-fry!
For a buttery finish, drizzle more avocado oil over the top before serving.
